case_title: BLANCA HERNANDEZ ET AL VS. PATRICK BRADY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED OCT-02-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRADY, PATRICK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, BLANCA DAVIS, JOSHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADY, PATRICK $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, JUDGMENT IS FOR PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY DAMAGE CLAIM. PLAINTFFS' CHIROPRACTIC AND ACUPUNCTURE TREATMENTS ARE NOT EXPLAINED BY THIS LOW IMPACT, MINOR REAR-END CONTACT BETWEEN DEFENDANT'S AND PLAINTIFFS' VEHICLES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, BLANCA

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PATRICK BRADY ON 11-14-17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP - RETURN TO SENDER."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS BLANCA HERNANDEZ AND JOSHUA DAVIS APPEARED. DEFENDANT PATRICK DAVIS APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
